message:
feat(demo): add centered rendering for wide terminals

Implement print_centered_renderable() to handle wide terminals (300+
columns) by rendering at a reasonable max width (120 chars) and
centering the output.

Problem: On ultra-wide terminals, components stretch to full width
making text hard to read and tables excessively wide.

Solution:
1. Render components at min(terminal_width, MAX_CONTENT_WIDTH)
2. Center the rendered output in the full terminal width
3. Handle newlines within segments correctly

Also includes panel_scene refinements.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
